Donate Now
What We Do

Our Programs

From entrepreneur training to municipal policy, our programs meet communities and creatives where they are — and help them get where they want to go.

Featured Programs
🚀

Creative Entrepreneur Accelerator

12-Week Business Intensive

A 12-week intensive program equipping artists and makers with the business skills to turn their creative practice into a sustainable livelihood. Cohort-based, peer-driven, and deeply practical.

Learn more
🎭

Creative Placemaking Grants

Seed Funding for Public Art

Seed funding for public art, cultural districts, and creative reuse projects that transform underutilized spaces into community anchors and economic hubs.

Learn more
More Programs
🏘️

Community Cultural Planning

Policy & Place

We partner with cities and towns to develop cultural master plans that recognize and amplify local creative assets. From asset mapping to policy recommendations.

Learn more
🌾

Rural Creative Economy Initiative

Creativity Beyond the City

Supporting artists and makers in rural and small-town America — where creative assets are abundant but resources are scarce. Tailored workshops, peer networks, and micro-grants.

Learn more
📊

Creative Industries Research

Evidence-Based Advocacy

Our research team publishes the definitive annual report on creative economy health across 48 communities. We translate data into advocacy tools for city leaders and funders.

Learn more
🌟

Youth Creative Leadership

The Next Generation

A summer leadership program for high school students interested in arts entrepreneurship, connecting them with mentors, skills, and a vision for their creative futures.

Learn more
Make an Impact

Interested in Partnering?

We're always looking for cities, foundations, and organizations who share our vision for creative economic development.

Contact Us Learn More
N
NACED

National Association for Creative Economic Development — advancing communities through the power of creativity, culture, and innovation.
